use_cases: Animated hero section background with organic wave motion
Interactive decorative element for landing pages that responds to cursor movement
Ambient visual effect for creative portfolio or portfolio websites
Dynamic background for marketing or promotional web experiences
ai_summary: An animated wave visualization component that uses Perlin noise algorithms to generate smooth, organic flowing wave patterns. The waves create a dynamic, interactive background effect that responds to user hover interactions, making it ideal for creative landing pages, hero sections, or decorative ambient visuals in web applications.
